realistic.title: Builder
realistic.energy: tangible results, mechanical systems, physical engagement

social.title: Social Guide
social.energy: human connection, seeing others grow, collaborative problem-solving

flatProfileNote: You have broad, fairly even interests and can adapt to different roles. This versatility is valuable in early-stage ventures where you may need to wear multiple hats.

shareTexts.invite: What kinds of work actually give you energy?
shareTexts.minimal: I mapped my Work Interest Constellation. What energizes you?

recommendation.label: Outfinity initiative
recommendation.title: Explorer Circle
recommendation.text: Explorer Circle is a community for people who research difficult problems, build limited experiments, and look for collaborators with complementary interests. You do not need to share your result to participate.
recommendation.note: Opening Explorer Circle takes you to Substack. Your result is not transmitted.
